agribalyse.name_en: Chocolate flavoured milk, with sugar, partially skimmed, fortified with vitamins and chemicals elements
agribalyse.name_fr: Boisson lactée aromatisée au chocolat, sucrée, au lait partiellement écrémé, enrichie et/ou restaurée en vitamines et/ou minéraux

ingredients_text: FILTERED LOWFAT GRADE A MILK, CONTAINS LESS THAN 1% OF: ALKALIZED COCOA, NATURAL FLAVORS, CELLULOSE GEL, CELLULOSE GUM, SALT, CARRAGEENAN, LACTASE ENZYME, MONK FRUIT JUICE CONCENTRATE, ACESULFAME POTASSIUM, SUCRALOSE, STEVIA LEAF EXTRACT, VITAMIN A (PALMITATE), VITAMIN D3

ingredients_text_with_allergens_zh: 过滤的A级低脂牛奶，含有不到1%的：碱化可可，天然香料，纤维素凝胶，纤维素胶，盐，卡拉胶，乳糖酶，罗汉果浓缩汁，乙酰磺胺酸钾，三氯蔗糖，甜叶菊叶提取物，维生素A（棕榈酸酯），维生素D3
ingredients_text_zh: 过滤的A级低脂牛奶，含有不到1%的：碱化可可，天然香料，纤维素凝胶，纤维素胶，盐，卡拉胶，乳糖酶，罗汉果浓缩汁，乙酰磺胺酸钾，三氯蔗糖，甜叶菊叶提取物，维生素A（棕榈酸酯），维生素D3
